task_completion.description: Verify that bookmarks are organized into three culinary/safety folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Chrome Bookmarks Bar or Bookmark Manager showing three distinct folders created for culinary or safety purposes.

task_completion.description: Verify that non-kitchen bookmarks are moved to an 'Office_Archive' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Chrome Bookmarks Bar or Bookmark Manager showing a folder named 'Office_Archive' containing the previous accounting/office bookmarks.

task_completion.description: Verify the browser font size is set to 'Very Large'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Settings > Appearance showing the 'Font size' dropdown explicitly set to 'Very Large'.

task_completion.description: Verify custom search engines for 'usda' and 'recipe' are added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Settings > Search engine > Manage search engines and site search showing custom entries with the exact keywords 'usda' and 'recipe'.

task_completion.description: Verify the download directory is set to ~/Documents/HACCP_Logs and the download prompt is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Settings > Downloads showing the Location set to '/home/ga/Documents/HACCP_Logs' AND the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' switched to the OFF position.

task_completion.description: Verify the browser is configured to open startup pages for Sysco and ServSafe.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Settings > On startup showing 'Open a specific page or set of pages' selected, with URLs for sysco.com and servsafe.com listed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Chrome graphical user interface to make configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating Chrome settings menus and bookmark managers, rather than just editing Chrome profile JSON/SQLite files in a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the changes are made in the actual Chrome browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The active window should be the Google Chrome browser with standard Chrome UI elements (address bar, settings sidebar) visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by running scripts to modify browser state.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show python or bash scripts being executed to directly modify the ~/.config/google-chrome/Default/Preferences or Web Data files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Font Size: 'Very Large' (corresponds to size 24). Target Download Directory: /home/ga/Documents/HACCP_Logs. Expected Startup URLs: sysco.com and servsafe.com. Expected Custom Search Engine Keywords: 'usda' and 'recipe'.
